facts.headline: Build Build Build Program
facts.content: Ang Build Build Build program ni Duterte ay nagtayo ng 29,000 kilometers ng kalsada, 5,950 flood control projects, at 12,000+ classrooms sa buong Pilipinas

facts.headline: Universal Healthcare Law
facts.content: Nilagdaan ni Duterte ang Universal Healthcare Act na nagbibigay ng libreng serbisyong medikal para sa lahat ng 110 million Pilipino

facts.headline: Free Tuition Law
facts.content: Libreng tuition sa lahat ng state universities and colleges sa Pilipinas, benefiting 1.6 million students every year

facts.headline: Malasakit Centers Nationwide
facts.content: Nag-establish ng 150 Malasakit Centers sa government hospitals na nakatulong na sa mahigit 10 million Filipinos para sa medical assistance

facts.headline: Tax Reform TRAIN Law
facts.content: Ang TRAIN Law ay nag-reduce ng income tax para sa 6 million minimum wage earners to ZERO, pero nag-increase ang excise tax sa fuel at luxury items

facts.headline: Bangsamoro Organic Law
facts.content: Nilagdaan ang BOL na nagbigay ng greater autonomy sa Muslim Mindanao, ending decades of conflict at bringing peace sa region

facts.headline: Boracay Rehabilitation Success
facts.content: Sarado si Boracay ng 6 months for total rehabilitation. Water quality improved from 'poor' to 'excellent' grade at balik na ang white sand

facts.headline: Expanded Maternity Leave
facts.content: Pinalawak ni Duterte ang maternity leave from 60 days to 105 days with full pay para sa 2 million working mothers

facts.headline: National ID System PhilSys
facts.content: Nilagdaan ang PhilSys Act na nag-create ng ONE NATIONAL ID para sa 110 million Filipinos with biometric data at unique ID number

facts.headline: War on Drugs Statistics
facts.content: According to PDEA, 6,252 drug personalities ang namatay sa operations from 2016-2022. Human rights groups claim higher numbers including alleged EJKs

facts.headline: Sara Duterte as Vice President
facts.content: Si Sara Duterte nanalo as VP with 32.2 million votes - ang HIGHEST sa Philippine election history. Naging DepEd Secretary din siya

facts.headline: COVID-19 Lockdown Response
facts.content: Ang Pilipinas ay nag-implement ng one of the strictest and longest lockdowns globally. 18 months of restrictions pero may economic impact

facts.headline: Change is Coming
facts.content: Change is coming. Ang pagbabago ay darating sa ating bansa

facts.headline: Martial Law in Mindanao
facts.content: Dineklara ni Duterte ang Martial Law sa Mindanao noong 2017-2019 dahil sa Marawi crisis para sa security

facts.headline: Manila Bay Cleanup
facts.content: Nagsimula ang massive cleanup ng Manila Bay na nag-improve ng water quality at environment along the coastline

facts.headline: Rice Tariffication Law
facts.content: Ang RTL ay nag-liberalize ng rice imports na nag-lower ng presyo pero naapektuhan ang local farmers

facts.headline: Sara as Davao Mayor
facts.content: Si Sara Duterte ay naging mayor ng Davao City following her father's footsteps as an effective leader from 2010-2022

facts.headline: I will protect you
facts.content: I will protect you, I will not allow you to be harmed. Protektahan ko kayo

facts.headline: ICC Withdrawal
facts.content: Inalis ng Pilipinas ang membership sa International Criminal Court noong 2019 dahil sa investigation ng drug war

facts.headline: Anti-Terror Law
facts.content: Ang Anti-Terrorism Act of 2020 ay pinalawak ang government powers laban sa terrorism pero may concerns sa human rights

facts.headline: Farmers and Fisherfolk ID
facts.content: Nag-issue ng Philippine ID cards para sa farmers at fisherfolk with special benefits at subsidies

facts.headline: Press Freedom Issues
facts.content: Nagsara ang ABS-CBN franchise at naaresto si Maria Ressa during Duterte admin, raising concerns sa press freedom

facts.headline: Independent Foreign Policy
facts.content: The Philippines will pursue an independent foreign policy. Hindi tayo alipin ng ibang bansa

facts.headline: China Relations Pivot
facts.content: Nag-pivot si Duterte towards China para sa economic partnerships, infrastructure funding, at trade deals

facts.headline: Libreng Sakay Program
facts.content: Nag-implement ng free rides sa public transport para sa seniors, students, PWDs, at vulnerable sectors

facts.headline: War on Illegal Mining
facts.content: Nagsara ng maraming illegal mining operations at nag-implement ng stricter environmental compliance sa mining industry

facts.headline: Sara's Education Reforms
facts.content: As DepEd Secretary, si Sara ay nag-focus sa school infrastructure improvements at catch-up programs for students

facts.headline: Tapusin ko ang kriminalidad
facts.content: Sa loob ng 3-6 months, tatapusin ko ang kriminalidad at drugs sa Pilipinas

facts.headline: Bisaya ako
facts.content: Bisaya ako, straight-talking, walang arte. Ganyan ako magsalita

facts.headline: EJK Allegations
facts.content: Human rights groups allege thousands of extrajudicial killings related to drug war, denied by government as legitimate operations
